blocks.body: Future Simple: Questions and Short Answers — Will you...?, Yes, I will. / No, I won't.

{"level":"A1–A2","intro":"W pytaniach Future Simple stawiamy will przed podmiotem, a potem używamy V1.","rules":[{"label":"Will + subject + V1?","color":"emerald","text":"Jeden wzór działa dla wszystkich osób.","example":"Will you call? / Will she come?"},{"label":"Wh-questions","color":"blue","text":"Słowo pytające postaw przed will.","example":"When will they arrive? / What will you do?"},{"label":"Short answers","color":"amber","text":"W krótkiej odpowiedzi powtórz will lub won't.","example":"Yes, I will. / No, she won't."}]}

{"title":"1. Podstawowe wzory","intro":"Postaw will przed podmiotem.","items":[{"label":"Pytanie yes / no","title":"Will + subject + V1?","subtitle":"Will you help? / Will they stay?"},{"label":"Wh-question","title":"Wh-word + will + subject + V1?","subtitle":"Where will she live? / When will it start?"},{"label":"Odpowiedź twierdząca","title":"Yes, subject + will.","subtitle":"Yes, I will. / Yes, they will."},{"label":"Odpowiedź przecząca","title":"No, subject + won't.","subtitle":"No, he won't. / No, we won't."}]}

{"title":"2. Pytania i krótkie odpowiedzi","intro":"W krótkiej odpowiedzi nie powtarzamy głównego czasownika.","rows":[{"en":"Will you call me?","ua":"Yes, I will. / No, I won't.","note":"will / won't"},{"en":"Will she be there?","ua":"Yes, she will. / No, she won't.","note":"be remains V1"},{"en":"When will they arrive?","ua":"They'll arrive at six.","note":"wh-word first"}],"warning":"Nie mów Do you will...?, Will she comes...? ani Yes, I do."}

{"title":"3. Typowe błędy","items":[{"label":"Błąd 1","color":"rose","title":"Dodawanie do przed will.","wrong":"❌ Do you will come?","right":"✅ Will you come?"},{"label":"Błąd 2","color":"amber","title":"Zmiana czasownika.","wrong":"❌ Will she calls?","right":"✅ Will she call?"},{"label":"Błąd 3","color":"sky","title":"Odpowiedź z do / does.","wrong":"❌ Yes, he does.","right":"✅ Yes, he will."}]}

{"title":"4. Krótkie podsumowanie","items":["Pytanie = Will + subject + V1?","Wh-question = Wh-word + will + subject + V1?","Krótkie odpowiedzi: Yes, ... will. / No, ... won't.","Nie używaj do / does razem z will."]}

{"title":"5. Ćwiczenia","select_title":"Ćwiczenie 1. Wybierz poprawne pytanie","select_intro":"Wybierz poprawną formę Future Simple.","selects":[{"label":"a) Will she call? / b) Will she calls?","prompt":"Która odpowiedź jest poprawna?","answer":"a"},{"label":"a) Yes, I do. / b) Yes, I will.","prompt":"Która krótka odpowiedź jest poprawna?","answer":"b"}],"options":["a","b"],"input_title":"Ćwiczenie 2. Zbuduj pytanie","input_intro":"Ułóż słowa w poprawnej kolejności.","inputs":[{"before":"you / tomorrow / will / come?","after":"→","answer":"Will you come tomorrow?"},{"before":"when / arrive / they / will?","after":"→","answer":"When will they arrive?"}]}
